name: Fluffy Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the 2 eggs and stir in up to 3 cups of buttermilk (to taste) and 2 tablespoons of oil until combined.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the center of the dry ingredients.
4. Stir gently only enough to combine; the batter should remain lumpy.
